info.title: AutoSend API
info.description: AutoSend REST API for managing contact lists and segments

post.description: Creates a new contact list or segment for organizing contacts.

get.description: Retrieves all contact lists and segments for the authenticated project.
Retrieves a single contact list or segment by its ID.

delete.description: Soft deletes a contact list by its ID. Cannot delete lists that are used in active workflows.

post.description: Add multiple contacts to a contact list by email addresses or contact IDs.
Remove contacts from a contact list by email addresses or contact IDs.
Retrieve paginated contacts within a contact list, with optional email filtering.
